title: 5Xjj5Vdn5Fijgvrqwinpd3M9Demwgj
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Summary
How is it that within the space of a few weeks Kwasi Kwarteng was as unceremoniously sacked as Greek Gianis Varoufakis in 2015, and Liz Truss's position is as, if not more, precarious than Silvio Berlusconi's in 2012? The answer is really not that surprising: It's Quantitative Tightening meeting political moral hazard. We are seeing the worst bond market volatility in decades.
